title: Amtech P4020 150mm (6'') combination square
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: HARDY AND LIGHTWEIGHT: This 150mm (6'') combination square has a hardened and tempered lightweight aluminium blade with metric and inch graduations
VERSATILE: With a scriber and spirit level and precise 90° and 45° marking angles, it can be used as a square, height gauge, depth gauge, rule and level
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Square See more
